## Dataset Request

### Dataset Name
The name of the dataset you would like to see included.

### Cancer Type
What cancer type or tissue does this dataset represent?

### Platform
What sequencing or assay platform was used? (e.g., 10x Genomics, Smart-seq2)

### Cell Count
Approximate number of cells in the dataset.

### Public Access
- URL or accession number:
- Is it freely available without restrictions?

### Why It Fills a Gap
Explain why this dataset is needed and what gap it addresses in the current benchmark.

### Preprocessing
- [ ] I have preprocessed this dataset and can provide the processed files.
- [ ] I have not preprocessed this dataset.
